---
type: React Component
icon: fe-component.svg
title: Ctf ComponentMap.Generated
description: ctf-componentMap.generated maps Contentful content type identifiers to their corresponding React components, giving the rendering layer a single lookup table it can use to resolve entries pulled from Contentful into the right UI element.
level: component
owner: contentful/team-workflows
ddd_subdomain: generic
ddd_role: Generated Config Component
---

Because this file is generated, it stays in sync with the Contentful schema automatically rather than being hand-maintained, reducing the risk of drift between content types defined in Contentful and the components available to render them in the shared-ui layer of the marketing webapp.
